title: senecio gamolepis
intro: Senecio gamolepis, also known as Jacob's Coat, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio gamolepis include treating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional folk medicine.
